allowed: Real visibility/reappearance targets are part of FutureSemanticTraceState world-model supervision.
Association/reacquisition remains utility, not method definition.
Visibility/reappearance training may proceed only after target smoke verifies nontrivial supervised labels.
forbidden: Continuing medium/large training without real target smoke.
Claiming paper world-model output from non-degenerate embeddings only.
Claiming external hard-case result from Stage2 val split.
